reviews.title: Great mouse!
reviews.text: Finally a mouse that doesn't use a battery. I wasn't paying attention so it just died, but it still works while plugged into your USB. It has a great hand feel, and easy to use. I'm really happy with this.

reviews.title: They buy good reviews, don't trust them. GARBAGE quality product banking on dishonesty.

It also CANNOT be used while being charged, so don't count on being able to actually use this often. Horrible purchase, cannot advise against them enough.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:17a6e9e24e8e6f5bc981e3994746809]] Love this mouse! Feels great in my hand. Easy to use. Charges really fast. You can barely hear the clicks which is a plus.

10/10 would buy again.

reviews.title: Works really well so far
reviews.text: My old mouse broke so I ordered something new that I have never tried. Set up was very easy. Just plug in the little USB port wireless device that is included and the mouse already seemed to be at least partially charged so away I went immediately without issue. It comes with some very nice colors that are changeable with a push button on the bottom. I like the moving multiple colors myself. Very nice unit for the price.

title: Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Slim Portable Optical Quiet Click Computer Mice with Nano Receiver, Less Noise for Notebook, PC, Laptop, MacBook-Black and Blue
description:
Enjoy freedom and efficiency when you use the this Wireless Mouse. A nano transceiver plugs into your computer's USB port for a reliable wireless connection.  High Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Fly through tasks with the mouse's scroll wheel and three responsive buttons on up to half a year of battery life.
Product features
▶ Wireless connectivity for reliable usage ▶ Noiseless click, soft touch, offers extremely comfort which can make you focus on what you do without disturbing others ▶ High dpi movement resolution works on most surfaces ▶ Three responsive buttons and a scroll wheel for quick navigation  ▶ Dimensions: 1.4 by 2.6 by 4.7 inches (H x W x D)  ▶ Operates with one AA battery ▶ Advanced optical mouse with responsive tracking ▶ Wireless mouse reduces workspace clutter ▶ 3-button mouse for better functionality and fast scrolling capability  ▶ Requires Windows XP, Vista, 7/8/10/2000 and Mac OS X 10.4 or later for operation ▶ Backed by 1-year limited warranty
Specification
Battery size: AA Computer Connectivity: Windows Interface(s): Alkaline Handedness: Ambidextrous Interface(s): USB 2.0 Number Of Batteries Required: 1 Wireless: Yes Warranty: 1 year Brand Compatibility: Universal Model Compatibility: PC, Laptop, Windows devices System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS X 10.4 or later  Number of Buttons: 3 Mouse Operation: Button(s) with scroll wheel Plug and Play Operation: Yes

1 x Wireless Mouse  1 x USB nano Receiver
(in the battery compartment of the mouse, under the battery cover)

reviews.title: Comfortable to use as my everyday mouse.
reviews.text: I bought this Tecknet dual mode Bluetooth and 2.4 G mouse to replace a similar design 2.4 G only model. Although it works well after the Bluetooth connects, it can sometimes take a minute or so to connect with my Asus C302C Chromebook; other times it connects immediately. I don't really understand why. I think 4-1/2 stars is the right rating for this one. The connection issue is mildly irritating, but not a showstopper. I do recommend this mouse.

reviews.title: Awesome wireless mouse!

description: ✅ This wireless mouse plug and play, just two steps, is suitable for any desktop computer and laptop. The connection is 100% stable. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it🔋This is a rechargeable mouse. The picture on the mouse looks like it was blown up way to large to fit on the mouse. It feels like cheap plastic and for $20 I really could have bought something much nicer. This is completely trash. So disappointing.

reviews.title: awesome mouse, awesome vendor!
reviews.text: mouse was delivered a little earlier than expected, which is great! corsair is a highly trusted brand and the last one we had, same model, lasted a good 3 years before the stroller wheel gave out. there probably is a way to just clean the wheel, but we just got a new mouse and intend on keeping the old one. it has extremely smooth dpi and motion with a nicely weighted feel. good solid unit!

reviews.title: Good FPS mouse
reviews.text: The materials wear really easily but it was perfect for my build and is light enough for the games I play, love the dpi buttons

reviews.title: double click problem after only 6 months
reviews.text: Bought this 6 months ago, now 6 months later I'm having this "double left click" problem. I thought this issue is rare, turned out it's extremely popular with this new Corsair mouse. My last 2 Corsair mice lasted 12 years, this one is garbage. Do not buy this unless you plan on doing RMA with Corsair while waiting 30 days for them to replace your mouse like I am right now. Extremely frustrating. If you don't believe me, search for all other corsair mice, they all have low 4 star reviews with double left click problems.

reviews.title: Good find!
reviews.text: I got this to keep in my work bag as a backup/when I work from home. I will say the first impression wasn't stellar. The top plastic has a cheap look/feel to it. But it also makes up in some nice touches. For example, the USB fob. I was apprehensive about the keep slot for it because there wasn't something that made it feel or look actually secured. But turns out, there's magnetic component so it gets sucked in rather than loosely placed. Battery power seems as advertised. I haven't charged mine in about a month and it's still going. Ergonomics is about what you'd expect based on the photos.

reviews.title: No more Batteries
reviews.text: Love my new mouse! Old one I would turn off and on all the time to save battery. This one I keep wanting to then remember it goes to sleep and no more batteries. First charge went fast, haven't had to charge it since. Love the self storing dongle. Should have purchased this long time ago.

reviews.title: Too small to be ergonomic for large hands
reviews.text: This will be a quick return. This mouse is too small and does not have enough vertical lift to be ergonomic for someone with large hands. I was pleased with how quickly it charged. But after fully charging there is no response at all from the DPI button. And the initial setting is too slow for the mouse to be of real use. If I had kids at home I would pass this along for schoolwork, but it isn't adequate for gaming or long stretches of editing.

reviews.title: Perfect for carpal tunnel
reviews.text: If you have carpal tunnel get this now. No pain at all anymore

reviews.title: Nice vertical mouse
reviews.text: Took some time to get used to.  Once I let my hand relax and rest on the mouse, and move in a different manner, definitely feeling better overall.

reviews.title: Battery life isn't that great
reviews.text: I use this for work. 5 days a week for about 7 hours a day. I turn it off every night and turn it on every morning. I love everything about this mouse but the battery isn't that great. It died after about 2 weeks full charge

reviews.title: Returned

title: LZYDD Mouse Anti-Slip Tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat Resistant Pads / Anti Sweat Paste for Logitech G Pro Wireless Mouse
description: Anti-Slip tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat resistant pads / anti sweat paste for Logitech G pro wireless mouse
features: Come with 1 set including 4 parts ( 2 top parts and 2 side parts)
Only Anti-Slip tape included, No mouse included

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Was expecting more of a Dbrand style sticker, but this is even better. It's super rubbery and grippy. Don't ever plan on missing a shot when you play with this!

reviews.title: It works for G305
reviews.text: I recently purchased Logitech G305, But it felt slippery. Though this product was intended for GPW, it worked well for the G305.

reviews.title: Very good price-point for Laptop portability and Features
reviews.text:
Rating this PINKCAT wireless mouse is difficult in terms of "stars". The price-point and your intended use are big factors.

I'll get one thing out of the way to save you some time - if you're a gamer, I would say that this is not going to have the stable accuracy you need. In fact, I think it will frustrate gamers, so if you're a gamer then you need to move on/up to something more expensive. Just my opinion.

My usage is for work. Lots and lots of work - like 12-15 hours a day of non-stop "click click click" work, so I'm basing my review on that and in comparison, to my main "workhorse" mouse.

My main mouse is a Logitech Anywhere MX, which is an incredible mouse but is also about $50 more than this PINKCAT mouse. I wanted to find something similar in both size and features as my more expensive mouse but with silent click and more as a backup, and for basic uses this fits the bill pretty well.

As you can see in the photos, this mouse is only slightly larger than a Logitech Anywhere MX, so it's still plenty small enough for laptop / portable / small space use. Now that you know what I'm comparing it to, I'll get right to the pros & cons.

PROS:

- Very light-weight, significantly lighter than my MX, yet still similar in size & shape.

- The "silent" buttons are truly that! Something I wish was a feature with my noisy MX buttons.

- Only requires one AA battery (my MX requires two) and excellent battery life.

- Scroll-wheel is smooth, quiet, and comfortable.

- The dull mat style surface is very comfy and doesn't get sticky like the shiny slick surface of my MX.

- The "back" and "forward" thumb-buttons work as expected for quick switching back & forth on web pages and tabs / locations in file explorer folders.

CONS:

- Even with the "3 Grade Adjustable DPI" function, I wouldn't recommend this mouse for gaming or fine digital artwork in apps like Photoshop.

- The signal and receiver seem to be a little easily susceptible to signal issues and occasional jitter, but that could be due to the number of various devices I have in the room. When I first tested it out there seemed to be a lot of jitter and the cursor jumped around a bit, but after switching it to a different system than the one I used my MX on, and adjusting the mouse settings a bit in Windows, it has been pretty smooth.

- No side-to-side push with the scroll wheel, unlike my MX. (But again, we're talking $8 compared to $58).

- Battery compartment door is flimsy. It's OK, but handle with care when popping it open.

Overall, this mouse is fine for basic use, and for its price-point it's excellent.

This was really hard to rate in terms of "stars" , especially coming from the perspective of someone who owns a more finely tuned & designed expensive mouse. So... for the price and for basic use I'd give it 5 stars, but for smooth accuracy it's not going to measure-up to something like a high-end Logitech and would be more like 3 stars in that aspect. But for 8 bucks It's a great mouse - gets the job done for standard computer uses, and it's definitely light, silent buttons! So over all I have to give it 4 stars.

reviews.title: False advertisement
reviews.text:
See attached image. This is what you get. Colors of the actual item and the color of the advertised item. Not even close. Mouse itself is "ok" at best. DPI button makes noise like it is a mouse straight from 1990s. Item returned.

Update: Seller reached out to me and sent out a replacement, white and blue version. Mouse received and the colors are true to the image. DPI button needs improvement and the seller has promised to continue working on that feature. Otherwise can only say that it was a proper and appreciated gesture from the seller. Score updated to 4/5 for customer service.

reviews.title: RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
reviews.text:
RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
Great mouse. USB C re-chargeable. Can run in bluetooth or RF mode. Lights up so can see when lights are off. Feels great. Compact but not to compact, is still comfortable and ergonomical.
Affordable.
I used to buy the well known name brand mouse that can cost 2 to 4 times the price. With the competitor mouse after about 6 to 12 months it would start to double click. I now feel maybe that is "planned obsolence", so I will no longer buy that mouse.
The main shortcuts I use are forward and back which are already on two side buttons. I then also use Start + D for Desktop, so I can do that with this mouse.
Liked it so much bought 2 more for my other laptops / backups.
Great mouse.

title: Logitech POP Mouse, Wireless Mouse with Customizable Emojis, SilentTouch Technology, Precision/Speed Scroll, Compact Design, Bluetooth, Multi-Device, OS Compatible - Mist
description: Logitech POP Mouse - Silent Wireless Mouse Let personality POP on your deskspace and beyond with POP Mouse, your whisper-quiet, wireless mouse with fresh customization features. Take your self-expression further and download Logitech Software to customize the top button. Give it your own twist by assigning it to send your favorite emoji or another shortcut - such as Snip Screen, Mic Mute or Voice-to-Text. POP Mouse fits comfortably in your hand and slips easily into your pocket, handbag or computer case. SilentTouch technology makes every click whisper-quiet. The portable mouse's SmartWheel stays in sync with you, easily shifting from high-precision to speed scroll mode. Pair POP Mouse with up to 3 different devices at once, and use the Easy-Switch button to toggle between them. Alternatively, activate FLOW and glide between screens as you work, transferring text, files and images with a simple copy and paste. Connect the cordless mouse to your desktop, tablet or phone* using Bluetooth or a Logi Bolt USB receiver which you can purchase separately. With a classic Logitech promise of durability, POP Mouse is your companion for the long haul, with up to 24-month battery life** and auto-sleep power-saving technology that helps it last. Product details: Number of buttons: 4 Top button customizable with Emoji Software Sensor technology: Logitech High Precision Optical Tracking Battery type: 1 x AA battery (included) Battery life: Up to 24 months** Connection type: Bluetooth 5.1 Compatible with Logi Bolt USB receiver Wireless range: 32.81 ft (10 m) Compatible with Windows 10 or later, macOS 10.15 or later, iPadOS, Chrome OS and Android *Windows, macOS, Chrome OS, Android, iPadOS **Battery life may vary based on use and computing conditions.
features: Less is more: Soft grey and natural sand colors kiss on an elegant, minimalist palette, allowing you to make an understated impact with POP Silent Mouse in Mist
Bold, comfy, quiet: A compact and comfy wireless mouse with up to 24-month battery life that fits snugly in your palm, handbag and computer case, with SilentTouch Technology for whisper-quiet working
The emoji button: Press the colorful mouse's magic middle button to open a menu of emojis to use in your chats, or give it your own shortcut using Logitech Software (Windows and macOS only)
Shift gears on the fly: As if reading your mind, POP Mouse’s SmartWheel shifts from high-precision tracking to speed scroll mode, helping you whizz through long documents with one confident flick
FLOW between worlds: Connect to up to 3 devices on Windows, Mac, Chrome OS or Android using Bluetooth and glide between screens using the Easy-Switch button or FLOW
Aesthetic pair: Match your POP Mouse with the fun and bouncy typing experience of POP Keys wireless mechanical keyboard, with customizable emoji keycaps and cutting-edge media keys

Plastic parts in POP Mouse include certified post consumer recycled plastic (Blast: 46%; Daydream, Heartbreaker and Mist: 29%; Cosmos: 27%*). *Excludes printed wiring assembly (PWA) plastics, and packaging.
Certified carbon neutral: the carbon impact of POP Mouse has been reduced to zero.

reviews.title: Horrible Connection
reviews.text: I’ve tried this mouse with multiple devices now and it disconnects and reconnects every five seconds. It’s basically impossible to use.

reviews.title: Quiet and super fast Bluetooth setup - no Emoji function with iPadOS
reviews.text: Within a minute of taking this out of the box, I had it paired with my iPad. It was seriously so easy to just pair and go, and I love how it can be paired with three different things (just push a little button on the bottom of the mouse to switch between computers/iPads). It feels okay in my hand - not the highest quality I’ve seen (plastic is very basic and it is pretty lightweight as well), but it doesn’t feel cheap. The color is so fun, which is the main reason I got it. Also it is very quiet and doesn’t have any loud clicking. The one thing to mention is that the circle button under the scrolling wheel doesn’t have any functionality with an iPad. Nothing was happening when I kept clicking it to try and use the emoji shortcut, so after heading over to Logitech’s website i saw “*Emojis and software are currently supported on Windows® and macOS only.” So maybe iPadOS will eventually support this capability, but as of now it is useless. Overall I still like the mouse a lot for it’s ease of use, quietness, and color.

reviews.title: Beautiful little mouse with a pink color that truly POPS!
reviews.text:
THE GOOD:
---------------
* The pink color of this mouse really POPS!
* Operation is smooth, just like any mouse.
* Multi device with a click of button underneath the mouse. You can save up to 3 devices.
* Battery is included and is rated for 2 yrs. Wow, we'll see.
* Emoji dedicated center button for chats.
* Weighs 2.9 ounces.

THE BAD:
------------
* No information in box whatsoever about the emoji software. You'll need to go to Logitech's website and do some digging. I didn't bother since my little girl won't be chatting.
* Bluetooth only. No mentioning in the manual whether or not it works with their unifying receiver.

I got this mouse because my little girl loves pink, and the red coral color here truly pops! She does basic homework stuff on the pc. She's not at that chatting age yet, so I don't really care or tested the emoji feature. Logitech didn't make it easy for you to test it out anyway, so I didn't bother. I'll go 4-Stars overall.

reviews.title: great trustworthy brand, ergonomically comfortable with hours of use.
reviews.text: we have used logitech for so many of our technology needs over the decades and we love the new wireless mouse, which was super easy to connect.  the mouse can connect up to 3 appliances including tablets.  works for both android and apple.  very effortless to use and silent. the emoji button is not what we were looking for, but a plus.  Not being a Y gen - lol, it took me a while to figure how to work the emoji button.  again, not a key aspect for us.  Curious to test that the battery will last for 1 year as claimed, but easy to take off the 'color' plate and replace the AA battery.  very happy with the color.  fun and ergonomically comfortable.

reviews.title: I like the mouse
reviews.text: It is a piece of cotton candy fluff in my hands. I can move quickly over my laptop screen and edit easily. It paired immediately too. For those who like social media, you get an emoji button too. You just push on the wheel and hit the right part of the mouse top. I do not like social media anymore. But others do all the time.  They will love the ease of this mouse.

reviews.title: you get what you pay for
reviews.text: these work but feel like crap.  Left and right click are terrible.  Sometimes when I left click, as the piece of plastic is coming back up, it goes under the right side.  Its like someone took a solid sheet of plastic and cut a line down the middle to allow you to press down on the left or right side, its terrible.  Scroll wheel feels fine.  DPI button just cycles through, no way to go up or down, just cycles through 3 modes.  Very uncomfortable.  For the price, you get two and both are exactly like this so I doubt its defective.  I only got these to control my streaming PC so its not a HUGE deal, but if youre getting these for daily use - DONT DO IT.  I can hardly put up with these and I use them for maybe 10 mins a day.  Pay 15$ for one mouse.  I honestly feel like I could crush these with my hand - thats how crappy they feel.  They also go to sleep mode after like 5 mins so I have to constantly click it to wake it up, and it ends up opening apps.  Not worth the 15$

title: Wireless Mouse, 2.4Ghz Wireless Mouse Computer Mouse 1200DPI,6 Buttons with Nano Receiver for Laptop,PC,Chromebook,Computer,Notebook,Office (Grey)
description: How to connect: Step1:open the battery cover,then install the two AAA battery . Step2:Take out the USB dongle and close the battery cover . Step3:Plug the USB dongle in the USB port . Step4:Place your wireless mouse close to the dongle about 30CM,turn the power switch button to "ON", the led light will light up.Your mouse will connect with the dongle automatically and start working . Notice if the mouse doesn't work ,please place the mouse near to the dongle and press the connect button (underneath the mouse)and release ,it wll connect to work . Package details Wireless mouse x1 USB nano receiver x1
features: System support: Windows,Android/Linux office/Mac OS device.
Wireless Mouse :RF2.4G wireless transmission distance of up to 10m.
Easy operation: USB nano dongle and power switch ,more convenient when plug in USB ,Plug and Play make all the operation more easier than others.
with 800/1200 CPI switch ,press left+mid+right button for switching ,2.4Ghz wireless ,1200cpi optical technology.
Package Contents: 1x Wireless Mouse, 1x Nano Receiver,Powered by two AAA battery (not included)

reviews.title: Mouse in the house.
reviews.text: Works properly as it should, couldn’t beat the price.

reviews.title: It works great! But not for long!
reviews.text:
Came a day early, put two AAA batteries in, put the USB in the laptop, and away we go.

It works great.

Update: It didn't work for long. It starts out with the mouse going to sleep all on it's own, and then it gets worst (you wouldn't think it possible, would you). I left the laptop and mouse on while I ran to the store, when I came back it was working VERY intermittent (very jerky) so I opened it thinking maybe my batteries weren't all that good.

What did I find? One of the batteries was so hot I couldn't touch it. I'm surprised it didn't catch on fire.

I should have known better than to buy some Chinese garbage. Into the trash it went.

Don't buy this, it's a waste of good money.

title: Wireless Keyboard and Mouse Combo, EDJO Full-Sized Ergonomic Computer Keyboard with Wrist Rest and 3 Level DPI Adjustable Wireless Mouse for Windows, Mac OS Desktop/Laptop/PC (White)
features: 【ERGONOMIC WIRELESS KEYBOARD AND MOUSE COMBO】EDJO Full-sized wireless keyboard is ergonomically designed with Palm Rest and folding holder that can keep it at an optimum slope，prevent your wrists from hurting while long sessions of typing. Keyboard is also designed with anti-slide pads so it will stay in place when you're typing quickly. NOTE: THE USB RECEIVER IS INSERTED IN THE BATTERY COMPARTMENT OF THE MOUSE, YOU CAN FIND IT WHEN OPEN THE MOUSE BATTERY COVER.

【PLUG & PLAY 2.4G WIRELESS CONNECTION】One 2.4 GHz USB receiver can connect both the keyboard and mouse, can also be used separately, plug & play, no need to download any software. 2.4 GHz wireless provides a powerful and reliable connection up to 33 feet(10m) without any delays.

【AUTOMATIC POWER SAVING FUNCTION】The EDJO wireless keyboard and mouse combo has the function of automatically entering the power-saving state. When you stop using the keyboard more than 30 minutes, stop using the mouse more than 25 seconds, they will enter sleep mode respectively to save power. This feature greatly extends the battery life, you can click any button to activity the device. The keyboard need 1 x AA battery, the mouse need 1 x AA battery. (Battery Not Included)

【WIRELESS OPTICAL MOUSE】The mouse was optical design, even on some smooth surfaces, precise control can be obtained. 3-level adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600) allows you to choose your favorite moving speed of cursor. In addition, this wireless mouse is symmetry design, no matter you are Right handed Left handed, both hands are available, suitable for all people.

【UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY & AFTER-SALES SERVICE】This wireless keyboard and mice combo compatible with windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/X, Mac and other operating system. Works well with desktops, Chrome-book, PC, Laptop, Computer and more. If you encounter any problems during use, please contact us via Amazon email, we will provide a satisfactory solution.

reviews.title: Usable keyboard. Mouse is a little problematic.
reviews.text: The keyboard is good and more ergonomic than others but lack of function keys makes less than desirable. The mouse just kept, intermittently disconnecting so was unusable.

reviews.title: Comfortable to use
reviews.text: I didn't have any expectations for this wireless keyboard and mouse set. I just wanted it to sync up easily to the PC and it did. More than that, it is a surprisingly comfortable keyboard to work with. The keys are responsive and accurate. I can put it at an angle that I like. It is easy to store away. I just really like it more than I had expected. I may not have had particular expectations. I just wanted to try out a keyboard/mouse set on a PC that wasn't getting much use, but I may end up putting this set with my main PC set up. I like it that much.

reviews.title: Plug n Play
reviews.text: This is a nice keyboard mouse combo. Set up was simple. There is one dongle for both the keyboard and the mouse. The keyboard is quiet, comfortable and a good size. The mouse is responsive. Time will tell how long it lasts but for now I am pleased with its performance.

The symmetrical design makes it suitable for left and right hands. Computer mouse meets the needs of laptops, suitable for Chromebook, home, work, or travel, satisfying users with different habits.

【2.4GHz USB Quick Connect】 Wireless laptop mouse has been tested for 5 million keystrokes to ensure that this wireless mouse has excellent durability, advanced 2.4GHz wireless technology, it can still be stably connected to your computer within a distance of 33 ft, plug and play, easy to use.

【Auto Sleep Mode】The wireless computer mouse will enter automatic power saving mode after 1 minute of inactivity and sleep mode after 8 minutes. The laptop mouse can be woken up by clicking any key, which is not only energy-saving and environmentally friendly but also extends battery life to a certain extent (battery life may vary depending on the user and computer situation. 1 * AA battery [Not Included].
